name: Aleksandr Vassilievski
longDesc: Aleksandr Vassilievski est un général infanterie de qualité argent — URSS. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Infantry Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Entrenchment
skills.desc: Able to dodge 6% damage from the enemy's artillery units

skills.name: Ace Forces
skills.desc: Experience gained by the army in combat increases by 40%

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Emplacement apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

stages.label: Niveau d'entraînement 1
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 60 mérite.

stages.label: Entraînement final
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 100 mérite.

training.summary: Entraînement premium débloquant des compétences signature et augmentant les plafonds d'attributs.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4

trainedSkills.name: Infantry Leader
trainedSkills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

trainedSkills.name: Entrenchment
trainedSkills.desc: Able to dodge 6% damage from the enemy's artillery units

trainedSkills.name: Ace Forces
trainedSkills.desc: Experience gained by the army in combat increases by 40%

trainedSkills.name: August Storm
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding an infantry elite force, friendly units (including the commanding unit itself) within a 1-hex radius deal +10% damage to land units (If the elite force's level is at least 9, the bonus becomes 15%). For each additional friendly elite force within range, an additional 5% damage bonus is applied, up to 25%.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

trainedSkills.name: Strategic Deployment
trainedSkills.desc: After commanding infantry to attack, recover HP equal to 12% of the damage dealt. If a friendly armored unit or artillery is within 1 hex, infantry unit’s attack and counterattack range +1.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

longDescEn: Aleksandr Vassilievski is a silver-quality infantry general — USSR. Data extracted from the game — descriptions and tactical notes to be confirmed.
longDescDe: Aleksandr Vassilievski ist ein Silber-Infanterie-General — UdSSR. Daten aus dem Spiel extrahiert — Beschreibungen und taktische Hinweise noch zu bestätigen.
